---
layout: cv
title: "Adam Hobbs Resume"
---

# Adam Hobbs

**Data Science Student**  
BYU-Idaho  
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/adam-hobbs-09b8b420b/) | [GitHub Portfolio](https://github.com/hob24003-beep/DSPortfolio)

## Education

**Brigham Young University–Idaho**  
Bachelor’s Degree in Data Science  
Expected Graduation: [Add Graduation Date]

Relevant coursework:

- Data Science
- SQL and Databases
- Calculus
- Statistics
- Machine Learning
- Physics with Calculus

## Technical Skills

**Programming Languages**
- Python
- SQL
- HTML/CSS

**Tools and Technologies**
- Git
- GitHub
- VS Code
- Quarto
- MySQL
- pandas
- scikit-learn

**Data Skills**
- data cleaning
- exploratory data analysis
- data visualization
- storytelling with data
- predictive modeling

## Projects

### Data Science Portfolio Website
Built and published a personal portfolio website using Quarto and GitHub Pages to showcase data science projects, technical skills, and professional growth.

### Machine Learning Projects
Developed beginner machine learning models using Python and scikit-learn, including classification workflows, model evaluation, and feature analysis.

### SQL and Database Work
Created and queried relational databases using SQL, including filtering, grouping, joins, subqueries, and window functions.

### Data Cleaning and Exploration
Worked with raw datasets to clean, transform, analyze, and visualize data in ways that support better understanding and communication.

## Experience

### Math Tutor
BYU-Idaho  
[Add Dates]

- Help students understand mathematical concepts clearly and step by step
- Support problem solving in a patient and encouraging way
- Strengthen communication and teaching skills through one-on-one help

## Leadership and Involvement

### Project Edify
Co-created educational content and project ideas focused on learning, creativity, and making technical topics more engaging.

## Strengths

- analytical thinking
- problem solving
- communication
- willingness to learn
- creativity
- persistence

## Contact

**Email:** [Add your email]  
**LinkedIn:** [https://www.linkedin.com/in/adam-hobbs-09b8b420b/](https://www.linkedin.com/in/adam-hobbs-09b8b420b/)  
**GitHub:** [https://github.com/hob24003-beep/DSPortfolio](https://github.com/hob24003-beep/DSPortfolio)
